geographic_restrictions: Low-to-Moderate Income areas in Scranton, PA (specific areas detailed in a map)
project_area: Community development and business development grants for city projects
demographic_requirements: Low-to-Moderate Income area requirements for Scranton programs
eligibility_summary: Grants are distributed to community agencies and local businesses in Scranton, PA, with a focus on Low-to-Moderate Income areas. The Department of Economic and Community Development coordinates these grants, aligning them with capital budget needs.
